floor_history.headline: recon: lhu likely falls out of a plain truncating store (movhi=lhu; the (s8)(u16) is m2c transcription); $s0 address-caching may be natural block-local CSE of two identical lb reads — and if not, the pointer alias is a sanctionable last resort

Flagged construct #1 CLOSED CLEAN (cast-free store; .o register+reloc-exact vs HEAD). &-free subspace SWEPT (6 forms, floor 6) and the corpus check came back POSITIVE (func_8003B2C8/func_8003B328 use `u8 *p = &D_8010277C;` in COMPLETED-C) — only the permuter gate item remains.

Flagged construct #1 (the (s8)(u16) double cast) CLOSED CLEAN — removed, and the sandbox .o is register-exact AND reloc-exact identical to HEAD. The &-free subspace is now swept (6 measured forms, flo

frontier.hypothesis: The permuter will not find an &-free zero either: the ONLY C construct yielding a surviving address pseudo is a pointer local dereferenced as a plain scalar, and the permuter does not invent pointer aliases
frontier.mechanism: MEM(reg) is a 1-insn MIPS address so GCC keeps the register (callee-save across a call); MEM(plus(reg,reg)) is no cheaper than MEM(plus(symbol,reg)) so constant-propagation eats the pointer. Measured both directions in s2 (v07 = no la at all; v00 = the la, register-exact).
frontier.next_probe: LAST GATE ITEM, needs a PERMUTER-modality session (out of scope for structural): directed permuter campaign seeded on memory/grind/se_data_set/rejected/direct-cast-no-address-cache-scores-6.c (score 6, 93/93 insns) under the fresh-seed stopping rule (~20-30 fresh seeds, [[permuter-fresh-seed-discipline]]). A negative completes the lever-exhaustion record and discharges the Judge's third prerequisite.

frontier.hypothesis: With the permuter negative in hand, the pointer form is routable to layer-2 as a pointer-alias-fake-exception with an unusually strong packet
frontier.mechanism: The 2026-07-01 pointer-alias sanction post-dates the 2026-06-22 flag. The clean-replacement bar is met by: construct #1 removed outright; construct #2 made type-correct and FAKE-annotated; the &-free subspace swept (floor 6); the audit's 'inconsistency is the tell' premise disproved against the target bytes; and same-global precedent in accepted COMPLETED-C code (func_8003B2C8/func_8003B328).
frontier.next_probe: After the permuter negative: apply memory/grind/se_data_set/candidate.c to src/code6cac.c, re-verify 0 + register-exact vs HEAD, and route to a fresh layer-2 cheat-reviewer with the H1-H6 packet from hypotheses.md attached.

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Two codegen-coercion constructs with no semantic purpose: (1) '(s8)(u16)D_800A36A4' forces lhu vs lh for no semantic gain (sb discards the sign-extension difference); (2) 's8 *p = (s8*)&D_8010277C' caches the address in a callee-save register across a call where a direct cast would suffice — inconsistency between condition (direct cast) and body (pointer) is the tell. Both fail tests 1+2+3 of the 6-test checklist. Function needs a clean redo: remove the (u16) intermediate cast and replace *p with (s8)D_8010277C throughout, then find the pure-C structure that naturally produces lhu and $s0 address-caching.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)

Do not route the pointer-alias form to layer-2 until the '&'-free subspace has been searched, not merely hand-sampled: run a directed permuter campaign seeded on the score-6 direct-cast body under the fresh-seed stopping rule, run the matched-corpus check for any COMPLETED-C function whose asm caches a global's address in a callee-save register across a call, and bank both outcomes plus the four existing negatives in hypotheses.md with state.json brought current.

judge_constraint_progress.ampersand_free_subspace_searched: DONE (s2) — 6 measured forms, subspace floor 6: direct cast 6, subscript spelling 6, value-staging 9, table-pointer 16, store re-association 17, hoisted-arg temps 24 (95 insns vs target 93). See hypotheses.md H5.
judge_constraint_progress.matched_corpus_check: DONE (s2) — POSITIVE. 16 COMPLETED-C functions cache a global's address in a callee-save reg across a call. func_8003B2C8 + func_8003B328 (src/code6cac_c_ab.c:431,444) do it with `u8 *p = &D_8010277C;` — the SAME construct on the SAME global, in accepted code. func_800656EC (src/text1b.c:14780, `u16 *s0 = &D_800F0BC2;`) reproduces the exact lui/addiu-$s0-loads-across-two-jal shape. For a scalar global, EVERY accepted spelling of this shape in the tree is a pointer local. (saEft00Add was checked and DISCARDED as precedent — it is still in the queue.) See hypotheses.md H6.
judge_constraint_progress.permuter_campaign: OUTSTANDING — the one remaining gate item. Needs a permuter-modality session. Seed: rejected/direct-cast-no-address-cache-scores-6.c.
judge_constraint_progress.negatives_banked: DONE (s2) — hypotheses.md rewritten from empty to H1-H6 with all measurements; rejected/ now holds 6 forms; state.json current.
